description: Veo/Imagen/Lyria generation prompts and status for all assets including cutscenes

assets.name: Nebula Drift Background
assets.prompt: Parallax scrolling space background for Nebula Drift, (0, 191, 255) dominant with (255, 0, 255) accents, 16-bit pixel art style, 3-layer parallax depth, 1280x720, seamless loop

assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art boss sprite for nebula serpent, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic, 256x256, transparent background

assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art boss sprite for hive queen, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic, 256x256, transparent background

assets.name: Core Rift Background
assets.prompt: Parallax scrolling space background for Core Rift, (0, 0, 0) dominant with (255, 255, 255) accents, 16-bit pixel art style, 3-layer parallax depth, 1280x720, seamless loop

assets.name: Reality Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art boss sprite for reality warp, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic, 256x256, transparent background

assets.name: Prologue: Haven-7 — The Diagnosis
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Opening shot: orbital platform Haven-7 exterior, dark space background with distant nebula clouds in cyan (#00FFFF) and purple (#8B00FF). Cut to: interior med-bay, dim blue medical lighting. Young girl LYRA (8, pale, bioluminescent vein patterns faintly visible on temples) lies in medical bed. DARIUS STAR (34, rugged salvage pilot, dark jacket with orange (#FF5500) shoulder pauldron) kneels beside her, gripping her hand. His wife NAYA places hand on his shoulder. Camera slow push-in on Darius's face — determination masking fear. END on close-up of encrypted navy log glyph appearing on holographic screen, cyan glow reflecting in Darius's eyes. 15 seconds, 24fps, pixel art with limited dithering.

assets.name: Biome 1 Intro: Abyssal Trench — The Descent
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Establishing shot: stormy Pacific Ocean surface at night, lightning flashes. The NYXA (Darius's salvage ship, sleek silhouette with cyan thruster trails) plunges beneath waves. Underwater transition: descending through dark blue-green abyss, bioluminescent particles streaming past. Hydrothermal vents glow orange (#FF6600) in the distance. Ancient precursor ruins emerge from darkness — massive stone archways carved with glowing glyphs. Darius's ship silhouette small against the scale of the ruins. 12 seconds, 24fps, consistent top-left lighting.

assets.name: Biome 1 Boss Reveal: Drowned Warden — Awakening
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Dark abyssal chamber, hydrothermal vent light pulsing orange (#FF6600). The DROWNED WARDEN stirs — massive armored isopod serpent, metallic blue-gray shell plates shifting, bioluminescent cyan (#00FFFF) optics activating one by one. Deep mechanical roar, screen shake. Close-up: Warden's central optic locks onto the Nyxa. Glyph symbols flash across its shell — it recognizes Aldric's genetic signature. Voice waveform visualization. Camera pull-back to battle-ready wide shot. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 1 Victory: Drowned Warden — First Glyph
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Drowned Warden's shell segments explode sequentially in orange (#FF6600) bursts. Its core emits a final cyan data-transmission wave. Amidst the debris, a glowing GLYPH fragment materializes — rotating geometric precursor symbol in gold (#FFD700). Darius's cockpit view: the glyph data downloads. Audio waveform appears on his HUD. A GRAINY HOLOGRAPHIC RECORDING flickers — Aldric Star's silhouette, voice distorted by static. Darius's hand tightens on the flight stick. Fade to black. 12 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 1→2: Coral Graveyard Passage
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa engines flare cyan (#00FFFF). Hyperspace warp tunnel effect — streaks of blue and purple light. Exit warp: Kepler-442b appears. Shallow alien ocean, bleached white coral formations visible through crystal-clear turquoise water. Dead reef stretching to horizon. The Nyxa descends toward the surface as the coral graveyard fills the frame. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 2 Intro: Coral Graveyard — Memory Vault
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa navigates through a maze of bleached alien coral skeletons — ancient cybernetic reef structures, rusted orange (#CC5500) metal frameworks entwined with dead pink (#FF4488) organic matter. Darius's ship approaches a massive vault door carved into a coral mesa. It opens automatically — precursor glyphs recognizing the bloodline. Inside: a holographic memory projection activates. Ghostly cyan figures of precursors flicker — they are dying, choosing extinction. One figure turns toward the viewer, spectral hand outstretched. The vision fades. Darius's cockpit interior, his face lit by the dying hologram. 12 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 2 Boss Reveal: Memory Wraith — Materialization
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The memory vault chamber goes dark. Coral dust particles swirl in a vortex. A SPECTRAL WAIL distorts the screen with glitch effects. The MEMORY WRAITH materializes from the dust — a decaying cyber-whale skeleton made of glowing pink (#FF4488) and green (#33CC55) fiber-optic structures, rusted orange armor plates. Its central coral eye glows magenta. Ghostly echo-projections of extinct reef predators flicker around it. Screen shake as it opens its maw. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 2 Victory: Memory Wraith — GLYPH-2
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Memory Wraith dissolves into shimmering glowing coral dust. GLYPH-2 materializes — a different geometric pattern, pulsing with purple (#8B00FF) light. Darius's cockpit: the glyph integrates with the first on his HUD. Brief flashback montage — the dying precursors from the vault vision, followed by Aldric's face, then Lyra in her med-bay bed. Darius closes his eyes for a moment. The Nyxa's engines power up for departure. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 2→3: Coelacanth Lair Approach
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Hyperspace warp tunnel in cyan and white. Exit: Europa's icy surface cracks open, revealing the subsurface ocean below. The Nyxa descends through ice cave formations — crystalline blue (#88CCFF) walls with trapped bioluminescent organisms. Thermal geysers erupt in the distance. The ship approaches a vast embryonic nesting ground, organic sacs glowing with faint blue light. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 3 Intro: Coelacanth Lair — The Decoy Embryo
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa descends through ice cave formations into the subsurface ocean of Europa. Bioluminescent embryonic sacs drift in the cold water. Lyra's voice: "Daddy, it's so beautiful... it's calling to me." Darius's cockpit — his HUD tracks the signal to a central stasis chamber. Inside, what appears to be a pristine Coelacanth embryo glows with warm, pure white light. Darius activates the Nyxa's salvage arm to retrieve it. 12 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 3 Boss Reveal: Hatchery Queen — Corruption
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Alarms flash. The stasis chamber ruptures. The embryo hatches prematurely, mutating into a grotesque Growth-Spike Horror with pulsing purple corruption veins. The central hatchery wall crumbles as the HATCHERY QUEEN emerges — a massive broodmother. Acid drips from her mandibles as her red optic sensors lock onto the Nyxa. Battle stations. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 3 Victory: Hatchery Queen — GLYPH-3
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Hatchery Queen and the Growth-Spike Horror collapse, dissolving into dark organic particles. GLYPH-3 materializes, joining the first two on Darius's HUD. The shockwave reveals a hidden precursor doorway: OPHION'S HIDDEN LAB. Inside: holographic research notes flicker to life. Darius retrieves a secure container holding a dormant Coelacanth stem-cell culture. Cut to: Haven-7 med-bay. Lyra sits up slightly, her bioluminescent patterns pulsing. She looks at her hands: "I felt it die, Daddy... it was a trick." Fade to black. 12 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 3→4: Nebula Drift Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa launches upward through Europa's ice crust, bursting into space. Hyperspace warp tunnel — purple and magenta streaks this time. Exit: the VEIL NEBULA fills the screen. Swirling clouds of cyan (#00BFFF) and magenta (#FF00FF) gas, lit by embedded stars. Gravity distortions create visible lensing effects. The Nyxa banks into the nebula as sentient gaseous tendrils begin to reach toward it. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 4 Intro: Nebula Drift — The Dreamer Speaks
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa drifts through the Veil Nebula's sentient gas clouds. Darius's cockpit instruments flicker. His HUD distorts. Suddenly — a PSYCHIC VISION floods his mind. The cockpit dissolves into abstract imagery: vast dark ocean of consciousness, swirling thought-currents of deep purple and black. A PRESENCE — not hostile, but impossibly vast and achingly lonely — reaches toward him. No words, just emotion: isolation stretching across eons. Darius gasps, gripping his head. The vision recedes. His HUD shows a new coordinate — the fourth Coelacanth's location. Ophion's AI: It spoke to you directly. That has never happened before. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 4 Boss Reveal: Storm Conductor — Lightning Descent
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The nebula darkens. Massive lightning storm cells crackle across the screen. A MASSIVE MAGENTA LIGHTNING BOLT strikes down from above. Riding it: the STORM CONDUCTOR — an electrical entity made of cyan (#00FFFF) and magenta (#FF00FF) plasma energy, seated on a mechanical lightning sled. Its optic sensors crackle with arcs. The sled's thrusters fire, and it charges toward the Nyxa, trailing chain lightning. Screen flashes white from the electrical discharge. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 4 Victory: Storm Conductor — GLYPH-4
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Storm Conductor's sled breaks apart in electrical explosions. The entity dissolves into space dust, its plasma energy dispersing into the nebula. GLYPH-4 materializes — jagged, lightning-bolt shaped, white (#FFFFFF) with cyan glow. Darius sits in silence. Over comms, Naya's voice from Haven-7. Darius responds. The Nyxa powers up for the next warp. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 4→5: Ice Ring Approach
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Hyperspace warp in cool blue tones. Exit: SATURN fills the background — massive ringed giant, pale gold and cream bands. The Nyxa enters the ice ring debris field. Asteroid fragments and ice crystals reflect starlight. On Darius's HUD: warning pings — MILITARY SIGNATURES DETECTED. Silhouettes of Navy gunships appear in the distance, moving in formation. Red alert lights flash in the cockpit. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 5 Intro: Ice Ring — Squadron Umbra
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Three Navy gunships emerge from behind an ice asteroid, weapons hot. The lead ship — sleeker, with red (#FF2222) trim — hails the Nyxa. CAPTAIN VALERA CROSS appears on Darius's comm screen: severe woman, early 40s, military bearing, eyes that have seen too much. She demands the precursor components. Darius refuses. Cross's expression flickers — something personal. Project Dream-Weapon requires the components. The word research lands like a blow. Darius's face hardens. Cross's gunships power up weapons. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 5 Boss Reveal: Cryo-Kraken + Squadron Umbra
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. An ice asteroid behind the Nyxa CRACKS OPEN. The CRYO-KRAKEN emerges — massive crystalline ice colossus, sharp refracting light-blue (#88CCFF) edges, armored white metal joints, glowing cold blue core. It roars silently in vacuum, ice shards spraying. Simultaneously, Cross's gunship breaks formation and powers its railgun. Two-phase battle arena forms: the Kraken below, Squadron Umbra above. Cross's voice on comms. Battle commences. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 5 Victory: Ice Ring — Cross's Defection
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Cryo-Kraken's crystalline shell shatters, core imploding. GLYPH-5 materializes — ice-blue crystalline structure. Cross's gunship is heavily damaged, drifting. Darius targets her but holds fire. Cross on comms, voice breaking, reveals her son was taken by Project Dream-Weapon. Her gunship's weapons power down. She joins Darius. Alliance formed. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 5→6: Fire Nebula Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Hyperspace warp in orange and red tones — heat-distorted. Exit: the BETELGEUSE REMNANT fills the frame. A dying star's corpse, massive plasma currents in orange (#FF4400) and ember yellow (#FFAA00). Industrial wreckage — ancient precursor mining platforms — drifts in the plasma field. The Nyxa and Cross's gunship enter the nebula, hulls glowing from ambient heat. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 6 Intro: Fire Nebula — Haven-7 Under Attack
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Split screen: LEFT — Darius in the Nyxa, cut off in the plasma field, comms dead, fighting through industrial wreckage. RIGHT — Haven-7 med-bay. Alarms blare. Navy boarders breach the hull. Cross fights them off in the corridors, but a squad reaches the med-bay. They attach a DEVICE to Lyra's temples — Navy attunement technology, crackling with purple energy. Lyra screams. Her bioluminescent vein patterns FLARE bright white. The device shatters. The Navy soldiers are thrown back by a psychic wave. Naya rushes in, weapon drawn. Lyra's eyes now glow with steady bioluminescent patterns. She looks at her mother calmly. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 6 Boss Reveal: Forge-Mind — Signal Transmitter
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The plasma field parts to reveal the FORGE-MIND — a molten, corrupted Coelacanth embedded in a precursor signal array. Its body is cracked lava orange (#FF4400) with ember yellow fissures. Orbiting mechanical fire satellites circle it in synchronized patterns. It emits a pulsing SIGNAL WAVE — visible concentric rings of distortion. Ophion's AI warns it's amplifying the Dreamer's call. The Forge-Mind's satellites align, forming a focusing array aimed at the Nyxa. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 6 Victory: Forge-Mind — GLYPH-6 / Lyra's Message
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Forge-Mind's shell fractures, lava geysers erupting as it melts into slag. GLYPH-6 materializes — molten gold (#FFD700), radiating heat waves. Comms restored. Darius immediately hails Haven-7. Naya appears, shaken but safe. Cut to: Haven-7 med-bay. Lyra sits up, her eyes glowing with steady bioluminescent cyan patterns. She smiles when she sees Darius on the screen. She says the thing in the dark is scared, has been alone for so long. Darius's face — fear, wonder, and fierce love all at once. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 6→7: Storm Belt Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Hyperspace warp in white and static-blue streaks. Exit: HD 189733b — a nightmare planet of supersonic winds, horizontal lightning networks, and perpetual storm. The Nyxa buffets violently in the atmospheric entry. Lightning bolts the size of cities arc across the sky. A dark storm vortex churns on the surface — the seventh Coelacanth's prison. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 7 Intro: Storm Belt — The Mad Coelacanth
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa fights through hurricane-force winds. Ahead: the STORM BELT Prison — a containment structure built around the seventh Coelacanth, now cracked and failing. Through the structure's broken walls, the STORM-SINGER is visible — a perpetual storm giant entity, gray (#333344) cloud-mass body, white-blue static energy arcs, massive lightning arms. It's not attacking. It's singing. A distorted, looping transmission plays. The transmission degrades into static, then screaming. The Storm-Singer's optic sensors turn red. Centuries of isolation have broken its mind. 12 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 7 Boss Reveal: Tempest Overlord — The Storm Breaks
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Storm-Singer's cloud body turns pitch black. Its optic glows blood red. Lightning cage pillars erupt around the Nyxa, trapping it. The TEMPEST OVERLORD condenses fully — a massive humanoid storm form with lightning generator hands crackling with white (#FFFFFF) energy. It raises both arms. Screen goes dark. When light returns, the Overlord is directly above the Nyxa, hands arcing with killing voltage. Screen shake as the first thunderhead bolt strikes. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 7 Victory: Tempest Overlord — Ophion's AI Reconstructed
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Tempest Overlord's cloud body dissipates into mist. Its core sparks out. But before dying, it emits a final data burst — a complete neural reconstruction. GLYPH-7 materializes — storm-white (#FFFFFF) ring. Simultaneously, a NEW holographic figure appears in the Nyxa's cockpit: OPHION'S AI, full reconstruction. A precursor face, ancient but warm, eyes that hold both deep wisdom and childlike wonder. He thanks Darius for putting him back together. The AI looks around the cockpit with wonder. Darius, despite everything, almost smiles. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 7→8: Derelict Fleet Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Hyperspace warp in gray and red tones — military frequency. Exit: GRAVEYARD ORBIT. Hundreds of derelict Navy warships drift in formation, hulls dark, emergency lights still flickering red (#FF2222) on some. The flagship NSS EVENT HORIZON dominates the center — massive dreadnought, hull gray (#555566), rust brown (#886644) corrosion at the edges. Debris fields float between the ships. Ophion's AI notes this is where the Navy hid their crimes. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 8 Intro: Derelict Fleet — The Bloodline Reveal
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa docks with the Event Horizon's bridge. Darius in EVA suit explores the darkened command center. Ophion's AI projects holographic data on every screen: genetic lineage charts, Project Dream-Weapon documents, Navy authorization codes. A REVELATION MONTAGE: Aldric Star's military file, Marcus Star's research terminated, Darius Star's birth record marked THIRD GENERATION, Lyra Star labeled PERFECT INTERFACE CANDIDATE. Darius stares, frozen. Ophion's AI explains they engineered his family to create a vessel for the Dreamer. Lyra was the goal. Darius's fist slams a console. The screens crackle. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 8 Boss Reveal: The Admiral's Remnant
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Event Horizon's reactor core powers up. From the wreckage, the WARSHIP HULK rises — the reanimated dreadnought merged with the eighth corrupted Coelacanth. Dark gray hull plating splits open, revealing a glowing red (#FF2222) AI core. Missile silos unlock. Turrets track the Nyxa. A GHOSTLY FIGURE materializes on the bridge — ADMIRAL CRANE, half-human, half-digital corruption. He tells Star his bloodline was always meant to serve. The Warship Hulk's railgun charges, red warning lines tracking across Darius's HUD. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 8 Victory: Derelict Fleet — GLYPH-8 / The Truth
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Warship Hulk's reactor undergoes meltdown, tearing the hull in half in heavy explosions. Admiral Crane's ghost disperses with a final, bitter laugh. GLYPH-8 materializes — dark steel gray with military precision geometry. Darius in the Nyxa's cockpit, staring at the glyphs on his HUD. Eight of ten. He realizes his grandfather's death, father's ruin, Lyra's sickness were all manufactured. Ophion's AI tells him he is not their design — he is what happens when their design fights back. Haven-7 on comms. Lyra's voice, calm but urgent: the Dreamer says he's close, he has to choose soon. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 8→9: Xenomorph Hive Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. Hyperspace warp in flesh-pink and acid-green tones. Exit: PROXIMA CENTAURI B. The planet is unrecognizable — transformed into a biomechanical landscape. Living flesh structures pulse with pink (#CC6677) light. Acid-green (#33FF33) veins run through organic terrain. Impossible geometries: buildings made of bone and chitin, breathing. The sky is purple. Ophion's AI, uneasy: The Dreamer has been redecorating. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 9 Intro: Xenomorph Hive — The Hive's Offer
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa descends into the hive. Organic walls pulse around it. A VOICE speaks — not through comms, but directly into Darius's mind. The voice is warm, maternal, impossibly vast, offering peace and safety for Lyra if he stops. A vision appears: Lyra, healthy, laughing, running through a garden — but her eyes are hollow, her movements slightly synchronized with the pulsing of the hive. It's a seductive lie. Darius shakes off the vision. The hive's voice hardens. The walls begin to close in. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 9 Boss Reveal: Hive Queen — Broodmother Awakens
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The organic walls TEAR OPEN. The HIVE QUEEN emerges — a giant biomechanical insectoid alien queen, dark purple (#6633AA) metallic carapace fused with organic tissue and mechanical cables. A neon-green (#33FF33) egg sac pulses beneath her chassis. She SCREECHES — screen distorts, acid rain begins falling. Crawlers burst from egg sacs and skitter along the walls. The Queen's tentacle-like claws strike from the screen borders, cutting off escape. Ophion's AI warns destroying the Queen will sever the Dreamer's hold on this world. 10 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 9 Victory: Xenomorph Hive — GLYPH-9 / Rejecting the Easy Path
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Hive Queen collapses, egg sac rupturing, dissolving into organic biomass. The hive walls stop pulsing. GLYPH-9 materializes — organic-mechanical hybrid, pulsing with life. Nine of ten glyphs now orbit on Darius's HUD. Darius speaks, to himself and to the fading hive: he's fighting for Lyra's humanity, for her right to choose who she becomes. Ophion's AI notes that is the difference between a father and a weapon. The Nyxa powers up for the final warp. Haven-7 on comms. Naya: they're with him all the way to the end. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Transition 9→10: Core Rift — Final Warp
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The most intense hyperspace warp yet — all colors bleeding together, reality distorting. Exit: GALACTIC CORE. A supermassive black hole dominates the background — event horizon ring in orange and white. Space itself bends. The Prime Coelacanth's structure floats at the edge of the horizon — ancient, vast, ringed with containment glyphs. Some glyphs are dark. The containment is failing. Ophion's AI: This is the threshold. Beyond it the Dreamer waits. 6 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 10 Intro: Core Rift — The Dreamer's Threshold
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Nyxa approaches the Prime Coelacanth structure — a massive ring of precursor technology orbiting the black hole. As Darius enters, reality WARPS. The screen glitches into raw code. Space inverts — black becomes white, white becomes black. The PRIME COELACANTH materializes, but its form keeps shifting, flickering between states. It speaks not with voice but with direct thought-insertion. Three doorways of light open before the Nyxa — each leading to a different fate. Ophion's AI explains the three endings. The Dreamer will accept any of them but only Darius can decide. 14 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 10 Boss Reveal: The Dreamer's Fear — Final Boss
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The three doorways collapse. Instead, a SINGLE ENTITY emerges — not the Prime Coelacanth, but something else. THE DREAMER'S FEAR: a subconscious projection of the Abyss Mind's terror of eternal isolation. It's an abstract geometric nightmare, shifting between shapes, displaying raw code in green (#00FF41) and reality-bleed magenta (#FF0088). The black hole's event horizon warps behind it. The entity doesn't speak — it SCREAMS a psychic wave that distorts the screen, reverses colors, and glitches Darius's HUD. Ophion's AI explains it's not testing weapons but resolve. The final battle begins. 12 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Biome 10 Victory: Reality Warp — GLYPH-10 / The Choice
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. The Dreamer's Fear dissolves — disintegrating into code lines, flashing the screen white. When vision returns: the Prime Coelacanth kneels, its form stable now. GLYPH-10 materializes — the Integration Core, a perfect sphere of pure white (#FFFFFF) light that harmonizes all nine previous glyphs into a unified pattern. The three doorways reappear, now labeled with precursor glyphs. Darius's HUD displays the choices: CONTAINMENT, SYMBIOSIS, TRANSCENDENCE. Darius stares at the doors. His hand hovers over the flight stick. Haven-7 on comms — Lyra's voice, telling him whatever he chooses, she loves him. The Nyxa's engines hum. The choice is the player's. 16 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Ending 1: Containment — The Cycle Continues
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. DOOR 1: The Nyxa enters blue light. All 10 glyphs lock into a containment grid around the Prime Coelacanth. Reality stabilizes. The black hole recedes. MONTAGE: Glyphs activating across all 10 biomes simultaneously — each Coelacanth reigniting, the network restored. HAVEN-7 MED-BAY: Lyra's bioluminescent patterns fade completely. She blinks, clear-eyed, a normal 8-year-old again, telling Darius she had the strangest dream. Darius embraces her. Naya joins them. FAMILY PORTRAIT: Darius, Naya, Lyra, and Selene on Haven-7 observation deck, looking at the stars. FINAL SHOT: Deep in the abyss, the Dreamer's consciousness curls into itself, alone again for eons. Fade to black. Text: CONTAINMENT — The cycle continues. 35 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Ending 2: Symbiosis — No One Is Alone Anymore
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. DOOR 2: The Nyxa enters golden light. The glyphs reconfigure into a communication array. A two-way BRIDGE OF LIGHT connects the Prime Coelacanth to everywhere. MONTAGE: Across all 10 biomes, the Coelacanths TRANSFORM — suppression fields become communication relays. The Dreamer's consciousness spreads not as infection but as connection. HAVEN-7 MED-BAY: Lyra rises, her bioluminescent patterns now steady and warm. She opens her eyes — one normal brown, one glowing with the Dreamer's deep-space light. She says she can hear everyone now, all the lonely things in the dark, and she's going to help them. OPHION stands beside her, his AI now embodied in the hatched Coelacanth form, looking at physical reality with wonder. A new era of connection begins. FINAL SHOT: The galaxy seen from outside — pinpricks of light, each a world where someone formerly alone now has a bridge. Fade to black. Text: SYMBIOSIS — No one is alone anymore. 40 seconds, 24fps.

assets.name: Ending 3: Transcendence — Love Crosses the Abyss
assets.prompt: 16-bit pixel art cutscene, retro arcade shmup style, cyberpunk biomechanical aesthetic. DOOR 3: The Nyxa enters white light. All 10 glyphs detach from the HUD and surround Darius himself — not the ship, but the man. A TRANSFER SEQUENCE: light streams from the glyphs into Darius's body. His form begins to dissolve. VOICEOVER — Darius's final words to Naya and Lyra: tell her he loved her more than anything, tell her to live, really live. HAVEN-7 MED-BAY: Lyra's patterns fade. She's cured. But she feels it — her hand goes to her chest. Tears stream down her face. Naya holds her. SPACE — THE THRESHOLD: Where Darius was, a new consciousness now exists — part human, part cosmic. The Dreamer and Darius merge, not as prisoner and warden, but as two minds who chose each other. FINAL SHOT: Years later. Teenage Lyra, now a pilot herself, stands on Haven-7's observation deck. She looks out at the stars. One star — brighter than the others — pulses twice. She whispers hi Dad. Fade to black. Text: TRANSCENDENCE — Love is the only thing that crosses the abyss. 40 seconds, 24fps.
